executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
All authenticated API requests MUST include the HTTP header "X-API-Key: 350b6ac402988036f99784fbdb71c040527801dd021f88f04cef0dd03425335e".

Cover the following backend scenarios as thoroughly as possible:
1. GET /v1/health - verify status, db, and classifier fields
2. POST /v1/chat - with valid prompt, check response, model_used, difficulty_tag, cost_usd, latency_ms, escalated fields; also test missing/invalid API key returns 403; test empty prompt returns 422
3. POST /v1/chat/stream - verify streaming response with metadata frame, token frames, and done frame; check event types in the stream
4. GET /v1/stats - verify total_requests, total_cost_usd, total_cost_saved_usd, model_usage, escalation_rate, savings_ts fields
5. GET /v1/recent - default limit=20, also test custom limit param
6. POST /v1/feedback - valid feedback=1 and feedback=-1; invalid feedback value returns 400; non-existent request_id returns 404
7. Auth - verify 403 returned on all protected endpoints when X-API-Key header is missing or wrong
